summary: Iteration 260 — Tenant Match Fix Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: client dropdown in Fatturazione → Nuovo Documento shows clients correctly (3 clients visible). The bug is FIXED. Key changes verified: 1) tenant_match(user) returns plain string 'default' (NOT MongoDB operator), 2) Startup migration dynamically backfills ALL collections, 3) Client creation uses tenant_id as string field.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

Startup migration in main.py dynamically lists ALL collections and backfills tenant_id
demo.py has correct import for tenant_match
